news.title:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.

news.title:
Tata Group addresses supply chain risks amid Israel-Iran conflict; Tata Steel to diversify limestone sourcing.
Chairman prioritizes employee safety in West Asia; plans risk mitigation for business continuity and customer eco-system.

Tata Group to expand CSR and enter hospitality sector in Jharkhand.

news.title:
Tata Steel Ltd confirms interest payment of ₹424.4 crores on NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Payment made on due date, 02-Mar-2026; record date was 13-Feb-2026 for listed NCDs.
news.summary:

Tata Group's tech for advanced steel to benefit other steelmakers.

news.title:
Fino Payments, Adani Green, NCC, Tata Steel, Thermax, and NIACL to remain in focus amid diverse market developments.
Adani Green operationalizes 185 MW wind project; Tata Steel divests Odisha Ferro Alloy Plant for ₹610 crore.
news.summary:
Fino Payments, Adani Green, NCC, Tata Steel, Thermax, and NIACL to remain in focus amid diverse market developments.

news.title:
Tata Steel's tax disallowance of ₹1,901 crore for FY08-FY15 was challenged.
ITAT favored interest deduction for FY08, cutting tax exposure by ₹215 crore to ₹1,686 crore.
news.summary:
Tata Steel's tax disallowance of ₹1,901 crore for FY08-FY15 was challenged.
ITAT favored interest deduction for FY08, cutting tax exposure by ₹215 crore to ₹1,686 crore.

news.title:
Tata Steel's NINL faces a demand for ₹587.9 Cr over iron ore dispatch charges.
Charges stem from 2021 Mining Act; NINL plans legal response, no financial impact stated.
news.summary:
Tata Steel's NINL faces a demand for ₹587.9 Cr over iron ore dispatch charges.
Charges stem from 2021 Mining Act; NINL plans legal response, no financial impact stated.

news.title:
IMFA acquires Tata Steel's ferro-chrome plant in Odisha for Rs 707.3 crore.
The acquisition boosts IMFA's capacity to 1.5 lakh tpa, making it India's largest ferro-chrome producer.
news.summary:
IMFA acquires Tata Steel's ferro-chrome plant in Odisha for Rs 707.3 crore.
The acquisition boosts IMFA's capacity to 1.5 lakh tpa, making it India's largest ferro-chrome producer.

news.title:
Tata Steel redeemed ₹2,000 crore commercial paper on February 27, 2026, ahead of the due date.
The redemption followed SEBI guidelines, ensuring compliance with listing and securities norms.
news.summary:
Tata Steel redeemed ₹2,000 crore commercial paper on February 27, 2026, ahead of the due date.

news.title: Tata Steel sold its Jajpur Ferro Alloy Plant to Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys for ₹610 cr.
news.summary: Tata Steel sold its Jajpur Ferro Alloy Plant to Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys for ₹610 cr.

news.title:
Tata Steel acquires 261.9 crore shares in T Steel Holdings Pte. Ltd for $264M (₹2,401.5 crore).
Post-acquisition, T Steel Holdings remains wholly owned by Tata Steel. Disclosure complies with SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Tata Steel acquires 261.9 crore shares in T Steel Holdings Pte. Ltd for $264M (₹2,401.5 crore).
Post-acquisition, T Steel Holdings remains wholly owned by Tata Steel. Disclosure complies with SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:

news.title:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.
Brokerages favor JSW Steel, Vedanta, Lloyds with strong demand, price hikes, and growth prospects driving optimism.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel MD highlights uncertainty over US tariff changes, noting possible impacts on downstream exporters like auto component manufacturers.
Tata Steel's European exports to the US face unclear tariffs; stock gained 47% over the last year, with a market cap of ₹2.6L crore.
news.summary:
Tata Steel MD highlights uncertainty over US tariff changes, noting possible impacts on downstream exporters like auto component manufacturers.
